user.title: Connect to Revolution Pi
user.description: Set up your Revolution Pi connection.

tcp.title: TCP Connection
tcp.description: Enter the IP address of the remote Revolution Pi.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Revolution Pi. Ensure revpimodio2 is installed and piCtory is configured.

abort.already_configured: This Revolution Pi is already configured.

add_building_device.title: Add Building Device
add_building_device.description: Select a device template to add.

confirm_building_device.title: Configure Building Device
confirm_building_device.description:
Confirm device name and map IO points to your piCtory configuration.
{errors}

remove_building_device.title: Remove Building Device
remove_building_device.description: Select a building device to remove.

error.template_load_failed: Failed to load the selected template.
error.io_not_found: Some IO names were not found in the RevPi process image. Check the names match your piCtory configuration.

abort.no_templates: No device templates found. Place JSON templates in the ha_revpi/templates directory.
